description: Loss-scale error: rssm.free_nats is set absurdly high, so the KL sits pinned at the free-nats floor (posterior collapse). The hyperparameter generator should flag rssm.free_nats via the KL-pinned indicator.
applied_diff:
--- a/configs/base.yaml
+++ b/configs/base.yaml
@@ -88,7 +88,7 @@
   sleep_every: 5_000          # env steps between consolidation windows
   sleep_grad_steps: 200
   # Additive knobs (not in the pasted defaults) needed by this implementation:
-  free_nats: 1.0
+  free_nats: 8.0
   kl_balance: 0.8
   min_std: 0.1
   sleep: true                  # false = wake-only (sleep-ablation condition)

proposals.rationale: Reward rolling mean dropped to 0.034 from a peak of 0.484 (raw logs) while the least-visited region holds only 1.562% of recorded positions — retrain/top-up suggested.
rssm/kl has sat at the free-nats floor (8.0) for the last 10 updates — the posterior is not using its budget (collapse indicator). Recommend lowering free_nats to 4.0 and observing kl/recon.
reward/rollout coefficient of variation is 4.9 and no logged scalar decomposes it — recommend adding `reward/per_region` so the variance source is attributable.
reward/rollout coefficient of variation is 4.9 and no logged scalar decomposes it — recommend adding `reward/per_episode_breakdown` so the variance source is attributable.
